title: Refactor OCP-026 (OCP): If-else if chain for special collection types violates OCP.

detected_issue.description: If-else if chain for special collection types violates OCP.
detected_issue.reasoning: This method contains an `if-else if` chain specifically checking for `EnumSet.class` and `EnumMap.class`. If support for other special collection types (e.g., new JDK collection types) were needed, this method would require modification.

fix_logic.summary: Refactor special collection constructor creation to use a registry pattern to satisfy OCP.
fix_logic.rationale: Replaced the hardcoded if-else chain with a registry of 'SpecialCollectionCreator' strategies. This allows adding new special collection types without modifying the core logic of ConstructorConstructor.
